title: Immunoprecipitation of protein lysate from culture cells using Src antibody
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4pvqy","text":" It is a procedure for immunoprecipitation using protein lysate from a neuronal cell line, NSC34, and a muscle cell line, C2C12 using DynabeadsTM Protein G Immunoprecipitation Kit (ThermoFisher).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":143,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"t4e5a","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

(Wako)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"n3hhv","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ktxkm","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"m4iok","text":"Equipment","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"uwxxb","text":"6 well plate","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"nabg1","text":"Cell scraper","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aps9i","text":"1.5 ml tissue grinder","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4whrx","text":"DynaMag™ Magnet (ThermoFisher)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eixrv","text":"1.5ml protein LoBind tube","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dbqtz","text":"Heat Block","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fje67","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Harvest NSC34 or C2C12 cells up to 80-100 % in 6 well plate
Aspirate media and wash plate with PBS
Aspirate PBS and add 500 µl of CelLytic TM M
Scrape cells with a cell scraper and collect media in a 1.5 ml tissue grinder
Preserve 10% of collected media at 4℃
Vortex Dynabeads™ magnetic beads in the vial for 30 Sec
Transfer 50 µl of Dynabeads™ magnetic beads to a 1.5ml tube
Place the tube on the magnet to separate the beads from the solution, and remove the supernatant
Remove the tube from the magnet
Add 10 μg of antibody diluted in 200 µL of Ab Binding and Washing Buffer to the magnetic beads
Incubate with rotation for 30 minutes at room temperature
Place the tube on the magnet and remove the supernatant
Remove the tube from the magnet and resuspend the magnetic bead and antibody complex in 200 µL of PBS-T
Wash by gentle tapping
Place the tube on the magnet and remove the supernatant
Add the cell lysate to the tube and gently tap to resuspend the magnetic bead-Ab complex
Incubate with rotation for 60 minutes at room temperature
Place the tube on the magnet.
Wash the magnetic bead-Ab-Ag complex 3 times using 200 µL of Washing Buffer for each wash. Separate on the magnet between each wash, remove supernatant, and resuspend by gentle tapping.
Resuspend the magnetic bead-Ab-Ag complex in 100 µL Washing Buffer and transfer the bead suspension to a clean tube
Place the tube containing the magnetic bead-Ab-Ag complex on the magnet and remove the supernatant.
Add 30 µL of Elution Buffer and 10 µL of Sample Buffer Solution (2ME+)(x4) and gently tap
Heat for 10 min at 70ºC.
Place the tube on the magnet and load the sample onto a gel
The authors have no conflicts of interest to report.

Src inhibition attenuates polyglutamine-mediated neuromuscular degeneration in spinal and bulbar muscular atrophy by Madoka Iida, Kentaro Sahashi, Naohide Kondo, Hideaki Nakatsuji, Genki Tohnai, Yutaka Tsutsumi, Seiya Noda, Ayuka Murakami, Kazunari Onodera, Yohei Okada, Masahiro Nakatochi, Yuka Tsukagoshi Okabe, Shinobu Shimizu, Masaaki Mizuno, Hiroaki Adachi, Hideyuki Okano, Gen Sobue, Masahisa Katsuno published in Nature Communications on 19 Sep, 2019 https://dx.doi.org/10.1038/s41467-019-12282-7
